subcodes.first_line: O Abdullah, I hope that thou mayest remain firm, even as 'Abdu'l-Bahá, in servitude to the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالله امیدوارم که در عبودیت جمال قدم چون عبدالبهاء ثابت قدم گردی و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
